## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the frontend calling Spring Boot only.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, tokens, private URLs, or real credentials.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-facing or operational changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I considered backward compatibility for existing scans, findings, and migrations.
